releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd lint
releaseGates.zhDetail: 代码规范检查通过，仅保留既有控制台日志警告。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd test
releaseGates.detail: 68 files / 1376 tests; includes P2 session guards, search/focus, diagnostic localization and IPC parity coverage.
releaseGates.zhDetail: 68 个测试文件 / 1376 条测试用例通过。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd build
releaseGates.detail: 淇濈暀 1 涓?Vite 鍔ㄦ€?闈欐€?import warning
releaseGates.zhDetail: 生产构建通过，保留一条既有模块拆分提示。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd lint:css
releaseGates.zhDetail: 样式令牌与样式规则检查通过。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd lint:tokens
releaseGates.zhDetail: 代码规范检查通过，仅保留既有控制台日志警告。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd lint:bundle
releaseGates.zhDetail: 代码规范检查通过，仅保留既有控制台日志警告。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd --filter @plotflow/progress-dashboard test
releaseGates.detail: 杩涘害浠〃鐩樺崟鍏冩祴璇曢€氳繃
releaseGates.zhDetail: 进度仪表盘单元测试通过。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd --filter @plotflow/progress-dashboard typecheck
releaseGates.detail: 杩涘害浠〃鐩樼被鍨嬫鏌ラ€氳繃
releaseGates.zhDetail: 进度仪表盘类型检查通过。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd --filter @plotflow/app test:e2e
releaseGates.detail: 79/79 passed on the current ADR-014 Graph-first/P2 source revision, including responsive geometry and visual baselines.
releaseGates.zhDetail: 74 条 ADR-013 Graph-first 应用 E2E 全部通过。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd --filter @plotflow/app test:e2e:blackbox
releaseGates.detail: 11 passed / 6 packaged-or-installed target skips on the current Graph-first source build.
releaseGates.zhDetail: 源码构建产物黑盒通过；packaged/installed 专属检查单独统计，不能代表正式发行通过。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd --filter @plotflow/app test:e2e:unpacked
releaseGates.detail: 2026-07-11 fresh package passed, 16 passed / 1 installed-only skip; strict native journey includes disk JSON Ajv Schema 0.2 validation.
releaseGates.zhDetail: 当前干净打包后的 Windows 解包应用黑盒通过；安装态注册表检查仍单独统计。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd --filter @plotflow/app test:e2e:installed
releaseGates.detail: No installed app path exists; rerun after an authorized interactive per-machine install.
releaseGates.zhDetail: 真实安装路径黑盒验收，需设置 PLOTFLOW_INSTALLED_EXE。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd audit --audit-level moderate
releaseGates.detail: Electron 42.5.0锛涙棤 GHSA ignore锛汵o known vulnerabilities found
releaseGates.zhDetail: 依赖安全审计通过；Electron 42.5.0 当前无已知中高危漏洞。

releaseGates.name: pnpm.cmd package:win
releaseGates.detail: 2026-07-11 rebuilt current P2 artifacts; installer SHA256 `C65CFFD0131F8E400DC663EFAE19022BCAE504F5825FBFED8A7FCDDF09A6A51C`, unpacked EXE SHA256 `17B148B65333AD57E4748708DE5E1DAC3A6943C872282E694E7BCA358BB050BF` (both NotSigned).
releaseGates.zhDetail: Windows NSIS 安装器、blockmap、latest.yml、调试元数据和解包应用已由干净构建生成。

releaseGates.name: Windows packaged smoke
releaseGates.detail: Covered by strict native Graph-first journey and full unpacked blackbox on the refreshed package.
releaseGates.zhDetail: 当前解包态黑盒主路径通过，桌面包未包含官网目录。

stableFeatures.title: Split editor workflow
stableFeatures.detail: Monaco editing, React Flow graph visualization, node navigation, and source-to-graph refresh are implemented.
stableFeatures.zhDetail: Monaco 编辑、React Flow 分支图、节点导航和源文本到图形刷新已经形成稳定闭环。
stableFeatures.evidence: M1/M2 complete; default app integration E2E currently passes 79/79.
stableFeatures.zhEvidence: M1/M2 已完成；默认应用集成 E2E 当前 79/79 通过。

stableFeatures.title: Parser, validator, diagnostics
stableFeatures.zhTitle: 解析器、校验器与诊断系统
stableFeatures.detail: The parser, diagnostics, markers, ProblemPanel, and graph status sync are implemented.
stableFeatures.zhDetail: 解析器、诊断、编辑器标记、问题面板和图节点状态同步已经接入。
stableFeatures.evidence: pnpm.cmd test passes 68 files / 1376 tests; Parser/Validator E2E record is green.
stableFeatures.zhEvidence: pnpm.cmd test 通过 68 个文件 / 1376 条用例；Parser/Validator E2E 为通过状态。

stableFeatures.title: Graph Lab graph-first workflow
stableFeatures.zhTitle: Graph Lab 图优先工作流
stableFeatures.detail: Graph Lab is the primary and default workspace with one-time migration, GUI history, complete Inspector editing, Source Drawer recovery, and source-of-truth writeback.
stableFeatures.zhDetail: Graph Lab 已成为主要且默认工作区，覆盖一次性迁移、GUI 历史、完整 Inspector 编辑、Source Drawer 恢复和唯一真相源写回。
stableFeatures.evidence: Default app integration E2E passes 79/79; source blackbox passes 11 with 6 target skips; fresh unpacked blackbox passes 16 with 1 installed-only skip and Ajv-valid Schema 0.2 output.
stableFeatures.zhEvidence: 默认应用集成 E2E 79/79 通过；源码态黑盒 11 项通过、6 项目标专属跳过；全新解包态黑盒 16 项通过、1 项安装专属跳过，并验证磁盘 JSON 符合 Schema 0.2。

stableFeatures.title: Official theme platform
stableFeatures.detail: Builtin themes and official remote ZIP themes are validated, downloaded, installed, and loaded through the official theme runtime.
stableFeatures.zhDetail: 内置主题和官方远程 ZIP 主题已通过目录校验、下载、安装与官方主题运行时加载链路。
stableFeatures.evidence: official-theme-service unit tests, theme E2E, and blackbox remote-theme E2E pass.
stableFeatures.zhEvidence: official-theme-service 单测、主题 E2E 与黑盒远程主题 E2E 均通过。

stableFeatures.title: JSON / HTML / TXT export
stableFeatures.detail: The export flow is implemented, sanitizes placeholder filenames, and verifies disk output after write.
stableFeatures.zhDetail: 导出流程已实现，会清洗占位符文件名，并在写入后验证磁盘输出。
stableFeatures.evidence: Export is part of the 79/79 app E2E gate; the strict unpacked native-dialog journey validates disk JSON against Schema 0.2 with Ajv.
stableFeatures.zhEvidence: 导出已纳入 79/79 应用 E2E；严格解包态原生对话框旅程使用 Ajv 校验磁盘 JSON Schema 0.2。

experimentalFeatures.title: Installed blackbox gate
experimentalFeatures.detail: Source and unpacked blackbox gates pass. Installed blackbox requires an authorized per-machine install; real engine smoke, manual patrol, and Authenticode signing also remain.
experimentalFeatures.zhDetail: 源码态和解包态黑盒已通过。安装态黑盒需授权完成 per-machine 安装；真实引擎 smoke、人工巡检与 Authenticode 签名也仍待完成。
experimentalFeatures.evidence: See spec/release-blackbox-gate.md for layered release status vocabulary.
experimentalFeatures.zhEvidence: 分层发行状态口径见 spec/release-blackbox-gate.md。

experimentalFeatures.title: macOS / Linux packaging
experimentalFeatures.detail: Cross-platform installers and smoke tests are deferred until CI matrix packaging is available.
experimentalFeatures.zhDetail: 跨平台安装包和冒烟验收延后到 CI 矩阵构建可用后处理。
experimentalFeatures.evidence: M7-03, M7-04, and M7-15 are deferred.

experimentalFeatures.title: Auto-update and public release pipeline
experimentalFeatures.zhTitle: 自动更新与公开发布链路
experimentalFeatures.detail: electron-updater integration, update server config, GitHub Release draft, and first-run onboarding are deferred.
experimentalFeatures.zhDetail: electron-updater 集成、更新服务器配置、GitHub Release 草稿和首次启动引导仍为延后状态。
experimentalFeatures.evidence: M7-09, M7-10, M7-12, and M7-13 are deferred.

roadmap.title: Stabilize official theme runtime
roadmap.detail: Keep expanding surface contracts only when a real official theme needs them, and keep blackbox coverage in release/nightly.
roadmap.zhDetail: 仅在真实官方主题需要时继续扩展 surface 合同，并将黑盒覆盖保留在 release/nightly。

roadmap.title: Complete M7 publishing chain
roadmap.zhTitle: 补齐 M7 发布链路
roadmap.detail: Add macOS/Linux packaging, auto-update, GitHub Release draft, first-run onboarding, and cross-platform smoke verification.
roadmap.zhDetail: 补齐 macOS / Linux 打包、自动更新、GitHub Release 草稿、首次启动引导和跨平台冒烟验收。

roadmap.title: Deploy this independent website
roadmap.detail: Build website/dist separately and deploy it to a server. Keep it excluded from desktop application packaging.
roadmap.zhDetail: 单独构建官网目录并部署到服务器，继续排除在桌面应用安装包之外。
